channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Plus drops to $24.99 during Prime Day streaming deal
item.description: The article highlights a Prime Day promotion on Amazon’s Fire TV Stick lineup, focusing on the Fire TV Stick 4K Plus as the main deal. Originally priced around $49.99, the device is being offered at a...

item.title: Confederate Flag Removed from North Carolina Exhibit After Backlash at Great American State Fair
item.description: A display featuring Confederate flag imagery at the North Carolina exhibit during the Great American State Fair on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., sparked widespread criticism after a video of ...

item.title: CNN panel challenges MAGA commentator Caroline Sunshine over refugee policy claims during heated discussion
item.description: A CNN political panel moderated by anchor Abby Phillip became heated during a discussion involving former Trump White House staffer Caroline Sunshine, who defended Trump administration immigration and...

item.title: Texas lieutenant governor’s claim about separation of church and state sparks fact-checking backlash
item.description: During a public appearance at the White House on Friday, Texas Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick sparked controversy after telling reporters that the phrase “separation of Church and state” is not found...

item.title: James Carville says future GOP primary candidates may attack Trump from within the MAGA movement
item.description: Veteran Democratic political strategist James Carville offered a prediction about the future direction of the Republican Party and how its presidential candidates may position themselves against Donal...

item.title: History of the NYPD Brooklyn Stand-Up Mugshot Identification System
item.description: The article explores the origins and development of the NYPD’s Brooklyn Stand-Up mugshot system, a photographic identification method introduced in 1918. Before this system was implemented, the New Yo...

item.title: US launches strikes on Iranian coastal and military sites following alleged attack on commercial vessel in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States carried out military strikes on Iranian missile and drone storage facilities as well as coastal radar installations following an alleged attack on a commercial cargo vessel in the St...

item.title: Richard Roland Holst and His Contribution to Dutch Art Nouveau and Symbolism
item.description: Richard Roland Holst (1868–1938) was a highly influential Dutch painter, graphic artist, and designer who played a major role in shaping modern art and design in the Netherlands during the late 19th a...

item.title: Rick Wilson Says Some Republican Senators Are Growing Increasingly Hostile Toward Trump After Primary Battles

item.title: Vanilla Ice Performance at Freedom 250 Great American State Fair Canceled Due to Severe Weather
item.description: The Freedom 250 Great American State Fair announced that it would close early on Friday, June 26, 2026, because of severe weather, resulting in the cancellation of rapper Vanilla Ice's scheduled perfo...

item.title: Using OpenTelemetry to Trace AI Agent Decisions and Tool Usage
item.description: The article explains how traditional logging falls short when debugging failures in AI agents, especially in high-stakes scenarios where an agent may execute unintended actions such as deleting or mod...

item.title: Casio announces Pokémon-themed G-Shock watch with July 2026 release and lottery sale system
item.description: Casio is set to release a special Pokémon-themed G-Shock watch as part of the franchise’s 30th anniversary celebrations. The collaboration uses the well-known G-Shock GA-110 model as its base and inco...

item.title: Laura Loomer Faces Online Backlash After Controversial Reaction to U.S.–Turkey World Cup Match

item.title: Corgi denies copying open-source data room software amid UI design controversy
item.description: Corgi, a Y Combinator-backed insurance technology startup, has become the center of controversy after being accused of copying an open-source data room product developed by Papermark. The dispute bega...

item.title: Hoffmann family expresses desire for Mario Lemieux to rejoin Pittsburgh Penguins organization
item.description: The Hoffmann family, the new principal owners of the Pittsburgh Penguins, has publicly expressed a strong desire to bring franchise legend Mario Lemieux back into a more active role with the organizat...

item.title: Supreme Court invalidates Hawaii restrictions on carrying firearms in public
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court has struck down a Hawaii law that significantly restricted where individuals could carry firearms in public. The decision, issued on Thursday, represents another major ruling fr...

item.title: Book on Trump's White House reportedly sparked anger over descriptions of his personal living habits
item.description: A new report describes President Donald Trump's reported reaction to the forthcoming book 'Regime Change,' written by New York Times reporters Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan. According to Zeteo, Tr...

item.title: Eleanor Parker’s Rise in 1940s Hollywood: Early Career and Film Roles
item.description: The article explores the early career of actress Eleanor Parker during the 1940s, a formative decade in which she transitioned from a studio contract player to a recognized leading lady at Warner Bros...

item.title: USA Men's National Team Faces Turkey in Final World Cup Group Stage Match at SoFi Stadium
item.description: The United States Men's National Soccer Team (USMNT) is set to play its final Group D match of the 2026 World Cup against Turkey on Thursday at 10 p.m. ET. The match will take place at SoFi Stadium in...

item.title: D.C. Councilmember critiques sparse offerings at Great American State Fair in Washington, D.C.
